ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "plant_id_epa" INTEGER /* EPA identifier for the plant */,
  "plant_id_eia" INTEGER /* EIA identifier for the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company owning the plant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the plant location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the plant location */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the unit belongs to */,
  "unitid" TEXT /* Unit identifier */,
  "generator_id" TEXT /* Generator identifier */,
  "boiler_id" TEXT /* Boiler identifier */,
  "fuel_type_primary" TEXT /* Primary fuel type used */,
  "fuel_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_eia" TEXT /* EIA code for the fuel type */,
  "prime_mover_code" TEXT /* Code for the prime mover */,
  "edat_capacity_mw" REAL /* Electrical capacity in megawatts */,
  "heat_input_mmbtu" REAL /* Heat input in million British thermal units */,
  "generator_id_match_method" TEXT /* Method used to match generator IDs */,
  "op_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the unit */,
  "op_status_date" TEXT /* Date the unit became operational */,
  "secondary_fuel_type_code" TEXT /* Secondary fuel type used */,
  "fuel_consumption_rate" REAL /* Rate of fuel consumption per hour */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Rating of the unit's operational efficiency */,
  "emissions_level" REAL /* Level of emissions produced by the unit */,
  "last_emissions_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last emissions test */,
  "next_emissions_test_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next emissions test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_prime_mover_code FOREIGN KEY ("prime_mover_code") REFERENCES prime_movers ("prime_mover_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_fuel_type_code FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_code") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company headquarters */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "compliance_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_eia" TEXT /* EIA code for the fuel type */,
  "fuel_cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the fuel per unit */,
  "emissions_factor" REAL /* Emissions factor of the fuel type */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prime_movers" (
  "prime_mover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prime mover */,
  "prime_mover_code" TEXT /* Code for the prime mover */,
  "prime_mover_description" TEXT /* Description of the prime mover */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the prime mover */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the prime mover */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prime_mover_id")
)
